'''Snapdragon Pro Series - BGMI''' is a Battlegrounds Mobile India tournament in {{FlagNoLink|in}} India.

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{box|start|padding=1em}}
{{BroadcasterCard
|position=English Commentator
|b1=Fritzz
|b2=Bloter
|b3=Shadow|b3link=Shadow (Caster)
}}
{{box|break}}
{{broadcasterCard
|position=Hindi Commentator
|b1=SuperJonny
|b2=kRaT
|b3=Phoenix
}}
{{box|end}}

===Format===
* '''Conquest Open Finals:''''' January 6th - 7th, 2024
** 16 teams from Open Qualifiers.
** 2 matchdays.
** 12 matches (6 each day).

===Allocations===
* {{Bgcolortext|up|'''Top 8 teams'''}} advance to {{LeagueIconSmall/snapdragon pro series|}} '''[[{{BASEPAGENAME}}/Challenge Season|Challenge Season]]'''.
